CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-09-2019 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-12-2019 Continued To Aug-28-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-19-2019 Continued To Jun-26-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Joint Motion For Approval Of Settlement, Dismissal, And Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar May-08-2019 Continued To May-08-19 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 502

Joint Motion For Approval Of Settlement, Dismissal, And Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar May-08-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Brown, Esq., counsel for Plaintiffs [by CourtCall]; Michael Fox, Esq., counsel for Defendants. Not Reported.

The Court notes the purpose of today's hearing, to wit: the parties' joint motion to approve a settlement agreement, for attorney's fees, and for dismissal of the action. The Court advises that it has reviewed the moving pleadings and at the Court's invitation, counsel offer no further discussion. Noting the same and the appearance of good cause, the Court grants the motion, signing the order for same in open court.

Judge: Hon. Lynne O'Malley Taylor [retired, sitting by designation]; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: not reported.

Joint Motion For Approval Of Settlement, Dismissal, And Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar Apr-04-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS SUPERIOR COURT OF CALIFORNIA, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO and JUDICIAL COUNCIL OF CALIFORNIA'S Joint Motion For Approval Of Settlement, Dismissal, And Attorneys' Fees

Off calendar pending judicial council reassignment. The judges of the San Francisco Superior Court recuse themselves from this case. Please contact department 206 for further information regarding the reassignment.

Judge: Ethan P. Sculman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-15-2019 Continued To May-08-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
